<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const date = ref<CalendarDate>(new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 2, 3))

const bookedDates = Array.from(
  { length: 15 },
  (_, i) => new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 2, 12 + i)
)
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Booked Dates">
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <Calendar
          v-model="date"
          :disabled="bookedDates"
          :is-date-unavailable="
            (date) => bookedDates.some((d) => d.compare(date) === 0)
          "
        />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import CalendarBookedDates from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarBookedDates.vue"
import CalendarCustomDays from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarCustomDays.vue"
import CalendarMultiple from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarMultiple.vue"
import CalendarRange from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarRange.vue"
import CalendarRangeMultipleMonths from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarRangeMultipleMonths.vue"
import CalendarSingle from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarSingle.vue"
import CalendarWeekNumbers from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarWeekNumbers.vue"
import CalendarWithPresets from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarWithPresets.vue"
import CalendarWithTime from "@/examples/calendar/CalendarWithTime.vue"
import DatePickerSimple from "@/examples/calendar/DatePickerSimple.vue"
import DatePickerWithDropdowns from "@/examples/calendar/DatePickerWithDropdowns.vue"
import DatePickerWithRange from "@/examples/calendar/DatePickerWithRange.vue"

import { ExampleWrapper } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <ExampleWrapper>
    <CalendarSingle />
    <CalendarMultiple />
    <CalendarWeekNumbers />
    <CalendarBookedDates />
    <CalendarRange />
    <CalendarRangeMultipleMonths />
    <CalendarWithTime />
    <CalendarWithPresets />
    <CalendarCustomDays />
    <DatePickerSimple />
    <DatePickerWithDropdowns />
    <DatePickerWithRange />
  </ExampleWrapper>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Multiple">
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <Calendar type="multiple" />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"
import { RangeCalendar } from "@/ui/range-calendar"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import type { DateRange } from "reka-ui"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const dateRange = ref<DateRange>({
  start: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 1, 12),
  end: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 2, 11),
})
</script>

<template>
  <Example
    title="Range"
    container-class="lg:col-span-full 2xl:col-span-full"
    class="p-12"
  >
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <RangeCalendar v-model="dateRange" :number-of-months="2" />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"
import { RangeCalendar } from "@/ui/range-calendar"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import type { DateRange } from "reka-ui"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const range = ref<DateRange>({
  start: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 4, 12),
  end: new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 6, 11),
})
</script>

<template>
  <Example
    title="Range Multiple Months"
    container-class="lg:col-span-full 2xl:col-span-full"
    class="p-12"
  >
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <RangeCalendar
          v-model="range"
          :number-of-months="3"
          locale="es"
          fixed-weeks
        />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const date = ref(
  new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth() + 1, 12)
)
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Single">
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <Calendar
          :model-value="date"
          layout="month-and-year"
          @update:model-value="(value) => (date = value)"
        />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/ui/card"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const date = ref<CalendarDate>(
  new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth() + 1, 3)
)
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="Week Numbers" class="justify-center">
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit p-0">
      <CardContent class="p-0">
        <Calendar v-model="date" :week-starts-on="1" show-week-number />
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Button } from "@/ui/button"
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/ui/card"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"

const date = ref<CalendarDate>(
  new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), 2, 12)
)

const currentMonth = ref<CalendarDate>(
  new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth() + 1, 1)
)

function addDays(dateValue: CalendarDate, days: number): CalendarDate {
  const jsDate = new Date(dateValue.year, dateValue.month - 1, dateValue.day)
  jsDate.setDate(jsDate.getDate() + days)
  return new CalendarDate(
    jsDate.getFullYear(),
    jsDate.getMonth() + 1,
    jsDate.getDate()
  )
}

function handlePreset(daysToAdd: number) {
  const today = new CalendarDate(
    new Date().getFullYear(),
    new Date().getMonth() + 1,
    new Date().getDate()
  )
  const newDate = addDays(today, daysToAdd)
  date.value = newDate
  currentMonth.value = new CalendarDate(newDate.year, newDate.month, 1)
}

const presets = [
  { label: "Today", value: 0 },
  { label: "Tomorrow", value: 1 },
  { label: "In 3 days", value: 3 },
  { label: "In a week", value: 7 },
  { label: "In 2 weeks", value: 14 },
]
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="With Presets">
    <Card class="mx-auto w-fit max-w-[300px]" size="sm">
      <CardContent class="px-4">
        <Calendar
          v-model="date"
          v-model:placeholder="currentMonth"
          fixed-weeks
          class="[--rdp-cell-size:theme(spacing.9.5)] p-0"
        />
      </CardContent>
      <CardFooter class="flex flex-wrap gap-2 border-t">
        <Button
          v-for="preset in presets"
          :key="preset.value"
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          class="flex-1"
          @click="handlePreset(preset.value)"
        >
          {{ preset.label }}
        </Button>
      </CardFooter>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { Calendar } from "@/ui/calendar"
import { Card, CardContent, CardFooter } from "@/ui/card"
import { Field, FieldGroup, FieldLabel } from "@/ui/field"
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from "@/ui/input-group"
import { CalendarDate } from "@internationalized/date"
import { ref } from "vue"

import { Example } from "@/components/example"
import IconPlaceholder from "@/components/IconPlaceholder.vue"

const date = ref<CalendarDate>(
  new CalendarDate(new Date().getFullYear(), new Date().getMonth() + 1, 12)
)
</script>

<template>
  <Example title="With Time">
    <Card size="sm" class="mx-auto w-fit">
      <CardContent>
        <Calendar v-model="date" class="p-0" />
      </CardContent>
      <CardFooter class="border-t bg-card">
        <FieldGroup>
          <Field>
            <FieldLabel html-for="time-from"> Start Time </FieldLabel>
            <InputGroup>
              <InputGroupInput
                id="time-from"
                type="time"
                step="1"
                default-value="10:30:00"
                class="appearance-none [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:hidden [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:appearance-none"
              />
              <InputGroupAddon>
                <IconPlaceholder
                  lucide="Clock2Icon"
                  tabler="IconClockHour2"
                  hugeicons="Clock03Icon"
                  phosphor="ClockIcon"
                  remixicon="RiTimeLine"
                  class="text-muted-foreground"
                />
              </InputGroupAddon>
            </InputGroup>
          </Field>
          <Field>
            <FieldLabel html-for="time-to"> End Time </FieldLabel>
            <InputGroup>
              <InputGroupInput
                id="time-to"
                type="time"
                step="1"
                default-value="12:30:00"
                class="appearance-none [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:hidden [&::-webkit-calendar-picker-indicator]:appearance-none"
              />
              <InputGroupAddon>
                <IconPlaceholder
                  lucide="Clock2Icon"
                  tabler="IconClockHour2"
                  hugeicons="Clock03Icon"
                  phosphor="ClockIcon"
                  remixicon="RiTimeLine"
                  class="text-muted-foreground"
                />
              </InputGroupAddon>
            </InputGroup>
          </Field>
        </FieldGroup>
      </CardFooter>
    </Card>
  </Example>
</template>
